mnemonics.title: FAMILY TREE
mnemonics.content: Think of a multilevel hierarchy like a family tree (Grandparent -> Parent -> Child), where each generation inherits traits from the one above.

mnemonics.title: GPC
mnemonics.content: Grandparent, Parent, Child: the order of constructors called in a multilevel hierarchy.

mnemonics.title: INHERITANCE CHAIN
mnemonics.content: Imagine a chain of inheritance where each link adds new properties and behavior or overrides those from above.
